rationale: The 2014 paper is cited only in grouped citation lists to support a broad claim that marketing effectiveness depends on congruence between promotional cues and brand characteristics (used in the H3 framing and Study 6 discussion). The citing article does not discuss this specific paper's dynamic-imagery theory, mechanisms, stimuli, or empirical results in any detail, nor does it build directly on its methods. This functions as general background support rather than a distinct, paper-specific building block.
